name: fabricate
description: A universal crafting & gathering system for Foundry VTT.

scripts.lint: eslint "src/{models,utils,integrations,config,migration,canvas,systems}/**/*.js" src/toolBreakageRuntime.js scripts/lib/semver.js scripts/lib/releaseTags.js scripts/lib/publishGuard.js scripts/lib/promoteGuards.js scripts/lib/hotfixPreflight.js scripts/lib/foundrySmokeSignal.js scripts/lib/managerLayoutGuards.js scripts/lib/screenshotCaptureMap.js scripts/lib/foundryRunIdentity.js scripts/release-s3.js scripts/validate-release-tag.mjs scripts/hotfix-preflight.mjs --max-warnings=0
scripts.format: prettier --write "src/{models,utils,integrations,config,migration,canvas,systems}/**/*.js" src/toolBreakageRuntime.js scripts/lib/semver.js scripts/lib/releaseTags.js scripts/lib/publishGuard.js scripts/lib/promoteGuards.js scripts/lib/hotfixPreflight.js scripts/lib/foundrySmokeSignal.js scripts/lib/managerLayoutGuards.js scripts/lib/screenshotCaptureMap.js scripts/lib/foundryRunIdentity.js scripts/release-s3.js scripts/validate-release-tag.mjs scripts/hotfix-preflight.mjs eslint.config.js
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "src/{models,utils,integrations,config,migration,canvas,systems}/**/*.js" src/toolBreakageRuntime.js scripts/lib/semver.js scripts/lib/releaseTags.js scripts/lib/publishGuard.js scripts/lib/promoteGuards.js scripts/lib/hotfixPreflight.js scripts/lib/foundrySmokeSignal.js scripts/lib/managerLayoutGuards.js scripts/lib/screenshotCaptureMap.js scripts/lib/foundryRunIdentity.js scripts/release-s3.js scripts/validate-release-tag.mjs scripts/hotfix-preflight.mjs eslint.config.js
scripts.test: node --test --test-timeout=30000 tests/*.test.js tests/journal/*.test.js tests/stores/*.test.js tests/components/*.test.js tests/actions/*.test.js tests/util/*.test.js tests/systems/*.test.js tests/canvas/*.test.js tests/canvas/regions/*.test.js
scripts.docs: cd docs && bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
